mapper.select: select right('00000' + cast(isnull(max(cast(camp_no as int)), 0) + 1 as varchar), 5) from campaign_mst where cmpycd = #{cmpycd}

select a.cmpycd as cmpycd, a.camp_no as camp_no, a.camp_nm as camp_nm, a.surv_gb as surv_gb, b.codenm as survgbnm, a.actdate as actdate, a.remark as remark, a.status as status, a.start_ment as start_ment, a.end_ment as end_ment from campaign_mst a left join haba900t_tbl b on a.surv_gb = b.codecd and b.cdtype = '910' where a.cmpycd = #{cmpycd} AND A.CAMP_NM LIKE '%' + #{camp_nm} + '%' ORDER BY A.CAMP_NO DESC
mapper.insert: insert into campaign_mst (cmpycd, camp_no, camp_nm, surv_gb, actdate, remark, status, start_ment, end_ment, addtime, updtime, updemp) VALUES (#{cmpycd}, #{camp_no}, #{camp_nm}, #{surv_gb}, #{actdate}, #{remark}, #{status}, #{start_ment}, #{end_ment}, GETDATE(), GETDATE(), #{updemp})
mapper.delete: delete from campaign_mst where cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and camp_no = #{camp_no}
mapper.select: select right('00000' + cast(isnull(max(cast(surv_no as int)), 0) + 1 as varchar), 5) from surv_mst where cmpycd = #{cmpycd}

select a.surv_no as surv_no, a.question as question, a.ans_tp as ans_tp, a.dspord as dspord, a.useyn as useyn, (select stuff((select ', ' + ans_cont from surv_dtl where cmpycd = a.cmpycd and surv_no = a.surv_no and useyn = 'y' order by ans_no for xml path('')), 1, 2, '')) as answers from surv_mst a where a.cmpycd = #{cmpycd} order by a.dspord, a.surv_no
mapper.insert: insert into surv_mst (cmpycd, surv_no, question, ans_tp, dspord, useyn, addtime, updtime, updemp) values (#{cmpycd}, #{surv_no}, #{question}, #{ans_tp}, #{dspord}, #{useyn}, getdate(), getdate(), #{updemp})
mapper.update: update surv_mst set question = #{question}, ans_tp = #{ans_tp}, dspord = #{dspord}, useyn = #{useyn}, updtime = getdate(), updemp = #{updemp} where cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and surv_no = #{surv_no}
mapper.delete: delete from surv_mst where cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and surv_no = #{surv_no}
mapper.select: select ans_no as ans_no, ans_cont as ans_cont, ans_point as ans_point, useyn as useyn, essay_yn as essay_yn from surv_dtl where cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and surv_no = #{surv_no} order by ans_no
mapper.insert: insert into surv_dtl (cmpycd, surv_no, ans_no, ans_cont, ans_point, useyn, essay_yn, addtime, updtime, updemp) values (#{cmpycd}, #{surv_no}, #{ans_no}, #{ans_cont}, #{ans_point}, #{useyn}, #{essay_yn}, getdate(), getdate(), #{updemp})
mapper.delete: delete from surv_dtl where cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and surv_no = #{surv_no}
mapper.select: select a.codecd as codecd, a.codenm as codenm, count(b.surv_no) as q_cnt from haba900t_tbl a left join camp_survey b on a.codecd = b.surv_gb and b.cmpycd = #{cmpycd} where a.cdtype = '910' and a.useyn = 'y' group by a.codecd, a.codenm, a.dspord order by a.dspord

select a.surv_no as surv_no, b.question as question, a.sortcd as sortcd, b.ans_tp as ans_tp from camp_survey a join surv_mst b on a.cmpycd = b.cmpycd and a.surv_no = b.surv_no where a.cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and a.surv_gb = #{surv_gb} order by a.sortcd
mapper.insert: insert into camp_survey (cmpycd, surv_gb, surv_no, sortcd, useyn, addtime, updtime, updemp) values (#{cmpycd}, #{surv_gb}, #{surv_no}, #{sortcd}, #{useyn}, getdate(), getdate(), #{updemp})
mapper.delete: delete from camp_survey where cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and surv_gb = #{surv_gb}
mapper.select: select cmpycd, surv_gb, attr_nm, attr_key, data_type, stats_yn, useyn from camp_attr_mapper where cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and surv_gb = #{surv_gb} order by attr_key
mapper.insert: insert into camp_attr_mapper (cmpycd, surv_gb, attr_nm, attr_key, data_type, stats_yn, useyn, addtime, updtime, updemp) values (#{cmpycd}, #{surv_gb}, #{attr_nm}, #{attr_key}, #{data_type}, #{stats_yn}, #{useyn}, getdate(), getdate(), #{updemp})
mapper.delete: delete from camp_attr_mapper where cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and surv_gb = #{surv_gb}
mapper.insert: insert into campaign_rslt_mst ( cmpycd, call_seq, camp_no, start_dtime, end_dtime, phone_type, call_telno, rslt_cd, remark, userid, line_num, interaction_id, media_type, chat_log, ai_summary, rec_file, addtime, updtime, updemp ) values ( #{cmpycd}, #{call_seq}, #{camp_no}, #{start_dtime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{end_dtime, jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{phone_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{call_telno, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{rslt_cd, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remark, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{userid, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{line_num, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{interaction_id, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{media_type, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{chat_log, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{ai_summary, jdbcType=NVARCHAR}, #{rec_file, jdbcType=VARCHAR}, GETDATE(), GETDATE(), #{updemp, jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
mapper.update: UPDATE campaign_call_list SET rslt_cd = #{rslt_cd}, status = #{status}, updtime = GETDATE() WHERE cmpycd = #{cmpycd} AND call_seq = #{call_seq}
mapper.select: SELECT a.surv_no AS surv_no, b.question AS question, b.ans_tp AS ans_tp, a.sortcd AS sortcd, (SELECT STUFF((SELECT ' / ' + CAST(ans_no AS VARCHAR) + ':' + ans_cont + ':' + CAST(ISNULL(ans_point, 0) AS VARCHAR) FROM surv_dtl WHERE cmpycd = a.cmpycd AND surv_no = a.surv_no AND useyn = 'Y' ORDER BY ans_no FOR XML PATH('')), 1, 3, '')) AS answers FROM camp_survey a JOIN surv_mst b ON a.cmpycd = b.cmpycd AND a.surv_no = b.surv_no WHERE a.cmpycd = #{cmpycd} AND a.surv_gb = #{surv_gb} AND a.useyn = 'Y' ORDER BY a.sortcd
SELECT COUNT(*) AS tot_cnt, SUM(CASE WHEN status = '010' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS ready_cnt FROM campaign_call_list WHERE cmpycd = #{cmpycd} AND camp_no = #{camp_no}

SELECT b.codecd AS rslt_cd, b.codenm AS rslt_nm, COUNT(a.call_seq) AS cnt FROM HABA900T_TBL b LEFT JOIN campaign_call_list a ON a.cmpycd = #{cmpycd} AND a.camp_no = #{camp_no} AND a.rslt_cd = b.codecd WHERE b.cdtype = '920' AND b.useyn = 'Y' GROUP BY b.codecd, b.codenm, b.dspord ORDER BY b.dspord ASC

SELECT x.cust_nm AS cust_nm, a.start_time AS addtime, ISNULL(c.codenm, '미처리') AS rslt_nm, a.media_type AS media_type, ISNULL(b.remark, '') AS memo, a.interaction_id AS interaction_id FROM total_interaction_log a JOIN campaign_call_list x ON a.cmpycd = x.cmpycd AND x.call_seq = #{call_seq} LEFT JOIN campaign_rslt_mst b ON a.interaction_id = b.interaction_id LEFT JOIN HABA900T_TBL c ON c.cdtype = '920' AND a.result_cd = c.codecd WHERE a.cmpycd = #{cmpycd} AND ( (a.keyword = x.tel_no AND x.tel_no IS NOT NULL AND x.tel_no != '') OR (a.keyword = x.email AND x.email IS NOT NULL AND x.email != '') ) ORDER BY a.start_time DESC
SELECT codecd, codenm FROM HABA900T_TBL WHERE cdtype = #{cdtype} AND useyn = 'Y' ORDER BY dspord

select a.surv_no as surv_no, b.question as question, b.ans_tp as ans_tp, b.dspord as dspord, b.useyn as useyn, (select stuff((select ', ' + ans_cont from surv_dtl where cmpycd = b.cmpycd and surv_no = b.surv_no and useyn = 'y' order by ans_no for xml path('')), 1, 2, '')) as answers from camp_survey a left outer join surv_mst b on a.cmpycd = b.cmpycd and a.surv_no = b.surv_no where a.cmpycd = #{cmpycd} and surv_gb = #{surv_gb}

SELECT a.surv_no AS surv_no, b.question AS question, a.ans_no AS ans_no, c.ans_cont AS ans_cont, a.point AS point, a.remark AS remark FROM campaign_rslt_dtl a JOIN surv_mst b ON a.cmpycd = b.cmpycd AND a.surv_no = b.surv_no LEFT JOIN surv_dtl c ON a.cmpycd = c.cmpycd AND a.surv_no = c.surv_no AND a.ans_no = c.ans_no WHERE a.cmpycd = #{cmpycd} AND a.rslt_no = #{rslt_no} ORDER BY b.dspord, a.surv_no
SELECT ISNULL(ans_point, 0) FROM surv_dtl WHERE cmpycd = #{cmpycd} AND surv_no = #{surv_no} AND ans_no = #{ans_no}
